rulings.Case Title: COMMONWEALTH LAND TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. FEDEX OFFICE AND PRINT SERVICES, INC et al (PROVIDE ACCESS)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing Re: Motion To Stay Trial Or In The Alternative To Bifurcate Proceedings Against Defendant Shah
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 5, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT JAY SHAH's Amended Motion To Stay Trial Or In The Alternative To Bifurcate Proceedings Against Defendant Shah GRANTED, the action is stayed pending the resolution of Shah appeal. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC. VS. MARIA PONFERRADA-TANEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 5, 2015, line 9. PLAINTIFF GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burden and show that the Defendant was properly terminated from the Housing Authority rental assistance program such that the defendant was responsible for the full amount of rent. See Plaintiff's Request for Judicial Notice, Ex. A, paragraph 12. Plaintiff's Request for Judicial Notice is Granted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 5, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANT NINO ANDRINI's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Complaint is not uncertain. See SFRO 37.2(r) and Regulation 1.17(h). = (501/REQ)
